activities_projects.title: Detailed Character Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the psychological change in Lushkoff
steps: Study Lushkoff’s behaviour at the beginning
Explain his struggles and weaknesses
Analyse the reasons for his transformation

activities_projects.title: Role of Compassion
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate how compassion changes a person’s life
steps: Identify examples of kindness in the story
Explain how these acts changed Lushkoff

activities_projects.title: Theme Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Identify and explain the main theme of the story
steps: Identify the central theme of the story
Support your answer with examples

activities_projects.title: Impact of Honest Work
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how honest work changes Lushkoff’s life
steps: Explain Sergei’s advice about work
Describe how work helped Lushkoff improve

activities_projects.title: Importance of Minor Characters
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate Olga’s role in the story
steps: Describe Olga’s actions
Explain how she influenced Lushkoff’s life

activities_projects.title: Story Structure Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the structure of the narrative
steps: Identify introduction, conflict, and resolution
Explain each part briefly

activities_projects.title: Message to Society
activities_projects.objective: Interpret the social message of the story
steps: Identify what the story says about begging and poverty
Write your interpretation in 5–6 sentences

activities_projects.title: Author’s Purpose
activities_projects.objective: Understand why the author wrote this story
steps: Think about the author’s intention
Explain the purpose in 4–5 sentences

activities_projects.title: Compare Beginning and Ending
activities_projects.objective: Compare Lushkoff’s life at the start and end
steps: Write two points about his life at the beginning
Write two points about his life at the end

activities_projects.title: Critical Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Reflect on the story’s deeper meaning
steps: Explain what the story teaches about human kindness
Write your opinion in 5–6 sentences
